split_policy.note: The three frozen evaluation tasks are an OfficeBench integration feasibility pilot only. The sample is too small to represent a benchmark score or a resume claim.

development_tasks.summary: Read a TXT file and create random_paragraph.docx containing its text.
development_tasks.reason: Minimal file-read to DOCX path for validating the adapter and output directory mapping.

development_tasks.summary: Read a notification PDF and create an email artifact for Alice.
development_tasks.reason: Exercises PDF extraction and the currently missing email artifact boundary without contaminating the frozen evaluation split.

frozen_evaluation_tasks.summary: Sort an Excel score table by midterm1 descending and save sorted_score.xlsx.
Extract text from market_analysis.pdf and create market_analysis.docx.
Convert a Word training manual to manual.pdf and distribute it to Alice as an email artifact.

mechanical_bug_fix_requirements: reset all three frozen tasks to their initial state
rerun all three frozen tasks, not only failed tasks
